actions.title: JonesinSRC website track
actions.description: Canonical registry entry for the JonesinSRC website so storefront trust, lead capture, funnel truth, and conversion work attach to one stable surface instead of scattering across theme edits and chat notes.
acceptance_criteria: Registry record preserves the website identity, directory, and temporary domain context
Future funnel, contact, and checkout actions can reference the website slug
Current trust-signal and lead-capture improvements are preserved in evidence

evidence.value: Trust signals and a lead-capture form were added to the site, but WallSlayer is still live with zero sales so the website remains a primary conversion surface.
